testcases.input: words = ["w","wo","wor","worl","world"] Output: "world" Explanation: The word "world" can be built one character at a time by "w", "wo", "wor", and "worl".
testcases.expectedOutput: "world" Explanation: The word "world" can be built one character at a time by "w", "wo", "wor", and "worl".

testcases.input: words = ["a","banana","app","appl","ap","apply","apple"] Output: "apple" Explanation: Both "apply" and "apple" can be built from other words in the dictionary. However, "apple" is lexicographically smaller than "apply".
testcases.expectedOutput: "apple" Explanation: Both "apply" and "apple" can be built from other words in the dictionary. However, "apple" is lexicographically smaller than "apply".
